name: Da Tutu
short_description: "Da Tutu" is a minimalist leisure game, waving a stick to let the rabbit take off.
detailed_description:
Da Tutu is a minimalist leisure game. You will play a little savage. Before the rabbit falls to the ground, hit it with a wooden stick to make it fly far enough.

The game is very short, maybe only 1 minute. But you can relax in the fragmented time and challenge the rabbit to fly the farthest distance.

Feature list

Two themes are available: snowy, volcano

Four kinds of rabbits: black, brown, gray, white

Three kinds of swing: 1 stick, 3 sticks, 5 sticks

At the same time, it supports multilingual, achievement, cloud archiving, high score records, and cumulative swing records
